widgets.overview: KPI overview cards (users, revenue, orders, growth)
widgets.charts: Interactive charts (line, bar, pie) with date range filter
widgets.table: Data table with sorting, filtering, and pagination

buildDashboard.line5: Include role-based access control (admin, editor, viewer)
buildDashboard.line6: Add responsive sidebar navigation with collapsible menu
buildDashboard.line7: Include data export (CSV, PDF) for tables and charts
buildDashboard.line8: Add real-time data refresh with loading indicators
buildDashboard.line10: Add proper error states and empty states for all widgets

buildAutomation.line5: Include environment variables and secrets management
buildAutomation.line6: Add caching for dependencies to speed up runs
buildAutomation.line7: Include parallel job execution where possible
buildAutomation.line8: Add rollback strategy on deployment failure
buildAutomation.line9: Include status badges and build notifications
buildAutomation.line10: Add staging and production environment separation

features.states: Multiple visual states (default, hover, active, disabled, error)
features.slots: Composable slots / children for flexible content

buildComponent.line5: Include comprehensive prop validation and default values
buildComponent.line6: Add full keyboard navigation and ARIA accessibility
buildComponent.line8: Add Storybook stories for all variants
buildComponent.line9: Include unit tests with testing library
buildComponent.line10: Add theming support via CSS custom properties or design tokens

debugTesting.line1: Help me debug this failing {{type}} test
debugTesting.line3: Describe the failure: what does the test expect vs. what actually happens?
debugTesting.line4: Is this test deterministic? Does it pass sometimes and fail other times (flaky)?
debugTesting.line5: Check test isolation — does the test depend on global state, external services, or execution order?
debugTesting.line6: Review the test setup/teardown — are fixtures, mocks, and test data properly initialized?
debugTesting.line7: Check for timing issues: async operations, race conditions, or insufficient timeouts
debugTesting.line8: Identify the root cause and provide the fix with corrected test code
debugTesting.line9: Suggest ways to make this test more reliable and maintainable
debugTesting.line10: Recommend CI-level strategies: retries, parallelization, test ordering

debugData.line1: Help me debug this {{pipeline}} data pipeline issue
debugData.line3: Describe the issue: is data missing, duplicated, corrupted, or delayed?
debugData.line4: Trace the data flow — at which stage does the data first become incorrect?
debugData.line5: Check schema compatibility — have any upstream schemas changed recently?
debugData.line6: Look for null/empty handling issues — are edge cases properly accounted for?
debugData.line7: Check for idempotency — does rerunning the pipeline produce the same results?
debugData.line8: Verify data volume — is the issue triggered by scale (too many or too few records)?
debugData.line9: Provide the fix and explain how to validate the corrected output
debugData.line10: Suggest data quality checks and monitoring to catch issues early
